The Calamity's Vanities mod adds a large array of new furniture pieces and decorations that can be obtained through many ways including crafting, enemies, or Crates.

== Furniture sets ==
The mod currently adds 4 furniture sets, being [[Calamity's Vanities/Bloodstone Furniture|Bloodstone Furniture]], [[Calamity's Vanities/Phantowax Furniture|Phantowax Furniture]], [[Calamity's Vanities/Xenomonolith Furniture|Xenomonolith Furniture]], and [[Calamity's Vanities/Auric Furniture|Auric Furniture]]. The details on each piece can be found on their respective set's page.

==Trivia==

*The Statue of Calamity's sprite was originally intended to be a resprite for the Tale of a Cruel World Music Box.
*The Eidolic Tree is a reference to Subnautica's Giant Cove Tree, aligning with the Eidolon Wyrm's previous sprite as a Ghost Leviathan.
*The mechanical bosses on the mechanical boss blueprints are based on those from the [https://forums.terraria.org/index.php?threads/the-calamity-texture-pack.76813/ Calamity Texture Pack] instead of Vanilla.
*The face seen on the Murasama Blueprint EX is the face of Samuel Rodrigues from [[wikipedia:Metal_Gear_Rising:_Revengeance|Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance]].
*Supreme Calamitas' plush icon is most likely based on a "Fumo" plushie. 
*The Slime God Plushie cannot be placed on furniture, only blocks and platforms.<br />
*The '''Living Grass''' decoration comes from the same NPC contest as the [[Calamity's Vanities/Jelly Priestess|Jelly Priestess]]. The NPC that the decoration was based on was a biomechanical spider like creature with a similar color palette. <small>[[File:The Constructer (calamity's vanities).gif]]</small>
